notes: This package is the canonical source of truth for future generation.
No generated implementation is retained or claimed as trusted runtime ownership.
A retained implementation can be promoted only after frequent-use evidence, regression validation, source refresh, tenant isolation review, rollback proof, and human approval.
Structured evidence supports the validated claim required by issue #1637.
The refreshed package preserves the infrastructure-as-code focus while adding research-backed workflow, evidence, refusal, and materialization contracts.
Authority baseline includes provider operating guidance, lane-tied workflow references, and control/evidence standards with refresh rules.
Evaluation, research, and functionality artifacts are internally consistent and cover all refreshed scenario IDs.
